title: Deep Research Framework
subtitle: Deep Research Framework for AI Agents
description: The Deep Research Framework equips AI Agents with multi-turn iteration, multi-source information fusion, and logical reasoning capabilities to systematically analyze and validate complex problems. Through structured research processes, information aggregation, and cross-validation, the framework helps Agents generate more reliable and in-depth research conclusions.
sub_problems: Research Process Design: How to design multi-turn iterative research strategies that balance depth with efficiency
Information Source Management: Collection, deduplication, prioritization, and conflict resolution of multi-source information
Reasoning Chain Construction: Traceability of logical derivation from raw information to conclusions
Fact Verification: Cross-validate information authenticity and identify and eliminate hallucinations and contradictions
Conclusion Generation: Comprehensive synthesis and confidence assessment based on multi-turn research results
best_practices: Adopt phased research strategy: Information collection → Initial analysis → Deep verification → Conclusion generation, with clear objectives and exit conditions for each phase
Establish information provenance mechanism: Record source, timestamp, and credibility score for each piece of information to support complete conclusion traceability
Implement multi-source cross-validation: Verify the same fact from multiple independent sources with conflict detection and automatic escalation mechanisms
Design dynamic research depth control: Dynamically adjust iteration rounds based on problem complexity, information consistency, and time budget
Provide research process visualization: Generate research trees, information dependency graphs, and reasoning chains for manual review and debugging
